reviews.comment:
Las empleadas, una más amable y divina que la otra.
Atentas, prolijas, educadas, etc.
La Señora mayor que está detras del mostrador, demasiado agria para atender al público. De muy mal genio permanente.
Los playeros, macanudos y serviciales.
En temporada o dias de mucho turismo, deberian agregar un par de despachantes de combustible más. Demasiada fila y espera.

(Translated by Google)
The employees were all incredibly kind and charming.

Attentive, meticulous, polite, etc.

The older woman behind the counter was far too sour to serve the public. She was always in a bad mood.

The attendants were great and helpful.
During peak season or busy tourist days, they should add a couple more gas station attendants. The lines and wait times are too long.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcWFYY3p3RRAB
